text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, I drop by the gym...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Phew... Okay, I think that's good enough for
today. I have to wash off this sweat...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Good work today, Flower.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh, Bourbon? Are you just now starting training?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Affirmative.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I thought you said you were going to train
outside?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: That operation had to be terminated due to rain.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I relocated to an interior space and shall
reinitiate my training protocol.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Reinitiate your training protocol? You mean
you're starting over?!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Affirmative. To execute my pre-calculated
training protocol, system reconfiguration is
required.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh, I see... Well, just don't overdo it, okay?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Understood. I'll make up for it by performing
thorough maintenance after the workout.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Wait, doesn't that mean you're planning to
overdo it?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Oh, I know!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Bourbon! Oh good, you're still here!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Flower? Do you require assis...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Sniff, sniff. I detect the smell of food coming from you.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Yes! I made something for you in the waiting
room next door!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: For... me?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Yep! You're working so hard, I figured I should
help you somehow.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'm pretty good at cooking, so I asked the lunch
lady if I could borrow the kitchen.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...That is very kind of you.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Shall we take a break?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Negative. My operation is still incomplete. I must
continue...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I see...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Well, that's okay! The dish I made should taste
fine cold, too—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Grrrowl!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Was that...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Ah... that was me. Cooking always makes me
hungry...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...Temporarily suspending operation. Shall we
have a taste?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Uh, um... Yes, please! Dig in!
